name: OneMain Financial
description_short: OneMain Financial offers fixed-rate personal loans from $1,500–$30,000 with terms of 24–60 months at APRs from 11.99%–35.99%. Funds available as soon as 1 hour after closing.
description_long:
OneMain Financial has operated for over 100 years and positions itself as a personal loan lender serving customers who need consolidation, emergency, or planned-expense financing. The company operates physical branch locations (including the W Flagler St branch in Miami, FL) alongside online and phone application channels, emphasizing accessibility and one-on-one assistance from loan specialists.

The company offers both secured and unsecured personal loans ranging from $1,500 to $30,000 with fixed interest rates, fixed monthly payments, and loan terms between 24 and 60 months. APR ranges from 11.99% to 35.99%. OneMain advertises same-day funding via their SpeedFunds program (money available as soon as 1 hour after closing with an eligible debit card). The application process is available online, by phone, or in-branch, with after-hours appointments available at some locations. Prequalification checks do not affect credit scores. No prepayment penalties are charged.

OneMain differentiates itself through its century-long operating history, physical branch network, and emphasis on in-person loan specialist consultation. The company markets itself to customers with varied credit profiles and life circumstances—offering debt consolidation, medical expense loans, auto purchase/refinance, home improvement, emergency loans, and specialty loans (wedding, funeral, vacation, pool, boat, RV, motorcycle). Fixed rates and fixed payments appeal to customers seeking budget predictability.

However, the advertised APR range (11.99%–35.99%) is notably broad, with the upper end falling within the subprime lending range. The website does not disclose average APRs, actual approval rates, or what credit profile qualifies for the lowest rates. The company requires proof of income, residence, and identity at closing, suggesting stricter underwriting than some emergency lenders. While fast funding is promoted, the 1-hour timeline applies only after closing, not approval. Customers with thin credit files or income documentation challenges may face friction.
pros: Fixed interest rates and fixed monthly payments with no prepayment penalties—transparent budgeting without surprise fees
Fast funding via SpeedFunds: money can be received as soon as 1 hour after loan closing (with eligible debit card)
Loan amounts from $1,500–$30,000 with terms from 24–60 months—flexible options for various borrowing needs
Multiple application channels: online, phone, or in-branch with after-hours appointments available
Prequalification checks do not affect credit score—safe way to estimate eligibility before formal application
Wide range of loan purposes explicitly supported: debt consolidation, medical, auto purchase/refinance, home improvement, emergency
100+ year operating history and established branch network providing local in-person support
cons: APR range of 11.99%–35.99% is very broad with upper end in subprime territory; website does not disclose average APR or what credit profile qualifies for lowest rates
Requires formal documentation (pay stubs, tax returns, proof of residence) at closing—stricter than emergency lenders and may delay funding for self-employed or gig workers
1-hour funding only applies after closing; actual approval timeline not specified, and pre-close processing could take days
No information provided about approval rates, default rates, or customer complaint metrics to assess actual lending standards
Physical branch requirement for in-person closing may not suit remote borrowers; online closing process not explicitly mentioned as available
best_for: Borrowers with fair to good credit seeking $1,500–$30,000 personal loans with predictable fixed payments and no prepayment penalties
Debt consolidation candidates wanting to consolidate multiple debts into a single fixed-rate monthly payment
Customers in the Miami area (or near other OneMain branches) who prefer in-person consultation with a loan specialist
Borrowers planning specific expenses (home improvement, medical, auto, wedding) with 24–60 month repayment horizons
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for borrowers seeking personal loans of $1,500–$30,000 with fixed rates, fixed terms, and transparent monthly payments—particularly those comfortable with documented income verification and in-person or phone-based lending. The main caveat is the wide APR range (11.99%–35.99%), which means actual rates depend heavily on credit profile and are not disclosed upfront; borrowers with weaker credit should prequalify to understand their likely rate before committing.
services: Specialty loans (wedding, funeral, vacation, pool, boat, RV, motorcycle)
Phone-based application and loan specialist consultation
In-branch application and closing (W Flagler St, Miami, and other locations)
Same-day funding via SpeedFunds (eligible debit card required)
